headline: Is BXP (BXP) Offering Value After Recent Rebound And Mixed Long Term Returns?
summary: If you are wondering whether BXP stock offers solid value at current levels, the key is understanding how its current price lines up against different measures of worth. BXP recently closed at US$59.43, with the stock up 1.5% over the last 7 days and 12.1% over the last 30 days, although it is still down 12.4% year to date and has declined 6.4% over the last year. These moves sit against a longer track record where the stock is up 43.1% over 3 years but down 30.2% over 5 years. This can...
